Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total number of dogs to 29. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the total to 30. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, reducing the total to 24. 

*** 

The number of dogs in Emily's rescue center is [current_dogs]. The total number of dogs received from the town on Thursday is [puppies_received], and the stray dog brought in on Friday is [stray_dog]. The number of dogs adopted on Saturday is [adopted_dogs], and the number of families who adopted dogs is [families_adopted]. The total number of dogs currently in the center is [current_dogs], which includes the [puppies_received], [stray_dog], and [adopted_dogs] from the various days.
